title: Terms and Conditions
content:
TERMS AND CONDITIONS

Effective Date: 01 January 2026

Welcome to Quick Spicy. These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") constitute a legally binding agreement between Quick Spicy ("Company", "Quick Spicy", "we", "our", or "us") and every person who accesses, registers, browses, or uses the Quick Spicy mobile application, website, WhatsApp services, customer support, or any other platform authorized by the Company ("User", "Customer", or "you").


By creating an account, accessing the Platform, placing an order, making a payment, or otherwise using any service offered by Quick Spicy, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to be legally bound by these Terms and Conditions, together with our Privacy Policy, Refund Policy, Cancellation Policy, Shipping & Delivery Policy, and all other policies published by the Company from time to time.


Quick Spicy is a technology platform that enables Customers to discover restaurants, place food orders, make online payments, and receive food deliveries through independent Restaurant Partners and Delivery Partners. Unless expressly stated otherwise, Quick Spicy does not prepare, manufacture, cook, package, or sell food items and shall not be responsible for the quality, quantity, taste, ingredients, hygiene, or preparation of food supplied by Restaurant Partners.


Users agree to use the Platform only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. Any misuse of the Platform, submission of false information, fraudulent transactions, abusive conduct, misuse of promotional offers, interference with the Platform's operations, or violation of applicable laws may result in suspension or permanent termination of the User's account without prior notice, in addition to any legal remedies available to the Company.


Quick Spicy reserves the right to refuse, suspend, cancel, or restrict any order or account where it reasonably believes that fraudulent activity, misuse of services, payment irregularities, security concerns, operational limitations, or violations of these Terms have occurred.


All prices, offers, discounts, delivery charges, restaurant availability, menu items, and service areas displayed on the Platform are subject to change without prior notice. Quick Spicy reserves the right to modify, discontinue, or withdraw any service, offer, or feature at its sole discretion.


All payments made through the Platform shall be processed through authorized payment service providers. Customers are responsible for ensuring that the payment information provided is accurate and lawfully belongs to them. Quick Spicy shall not be liable for delays, failures, or errors caused by banks, payment gateways, UPI providers, card issuers, or other third-party financial institutions.


Quick Spicy shall make reasonable efforts to ensure uninterrupted access to the Platform. However, the Company does not guarantee that the Platform will always be available, error-free, secure, or uninterrupted. Temporary interruptions may occur due to maintenance, technical failures, internet issues, cyber security incidents, or circumstances beyond the Company's reasonable control.


To the fullest extent permitted under applicable law, Quick Spicy shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, consequential, special, exemplary, or punitive damages arising out of the use of the Platform or services. The Company's total liability, if any, shall not exceed the amount paid by the Customer for the specific order giving rise to the claim, except where otherwise required under applicable law.


Quick Spicy reserves the right to amend, modify, or update these Terms and Conditions at any time. Any revised Terms shall become effective immediately upon publication on the Platform. Continued use of the Platform after such publication shall constitute acceptance of the revised Terms.


These Terms and Conditions shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of India. Any dispute arising out of or relating to these Terms shall first be resolved through mutual discussions. If the dispute remains unresolved, it shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts situated in Andhra Pradesh, India, without prejudice to any statutory rights available to consumers under applicable law.


For any questions regarding these Terms and Conditions, Users may contact Quick Spicy Customer Support at:

Phone:+91 81256 33886

Email: [quickspicyofficial@gmail.com](mailto:quickspicyofficial@gmail.com)
